summary: Plan-only live PR inventory classification. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly states this is not a dedupe cluster. No GitHub mutations, merge actions, fix PRs, or close actions are planned.

actions.reason: Maintainer-owned draft PR with focused plugin changes; not a duplicate, not low-signal closeout, and not eligible for merge/fix in this plan job.
Focused standalone WhatsApp PR; failing check blocks merge-style treatment, but the job disallows merge/fix and there is no basis for closure.
Standalone Matrix routing PR with explicit waiting-on-author and merge-risk labels; keep open for author/maintainer flow rather than close or merge in this inventory plan.
Focused standalone channels PR, but failed real behavior proof blocks any stronger recommendation; keep open for maintainer/author follow-up.
Docs-only standalone PR with low-signal-docs label, but low-signal closeout is disabled and the body raises a product/docs placement question for maintainers.
